en.source: Learning improves with small daily sessions.
en.target: Learning improves with small daily sessions.

en.source: Clear speech helps the listener understand each sentence.
en.target: Clear speech helps the listener understand each sentence.

en.source: A steady routine makes practice easier to repeat.
en.target: A steady routine makes practice easier to repeat.

en.source: I would like a coffee without sugar, please.
en.target: I would like a coffee without sugar, please.

en.source: I can call after seven if you still want to talk.
en.target: I can call after seven if you still want to talk.

en.source: I am sorry I answered so late.
en.target: I am sorry I answered so late.

en.source: I need a minute to think before I answer clearly.
en.target: I need a minute to think before I answer clearly.

en.source: Can you help me find the entrance.
en.target: Can you help me find the entrance.

en.source: Which platform does the next train leave from?
en.target: Which platform does the next train leave from?

en.source: I need directions to the nearest pharmacy.
en.target: I need directions to the nearest pharmacy.

en.source: Can I leave my bag here for a few minutes?
en.target: Can I leave my bag here for a few minutes?

en.source: The reservation is under my name.
en.target: The reservation is under my name.

en.source: Could I have the bill when you have a moment?
en.target: Could I have the bill when you have a moment?

en.source: Is there a table available near the window?
en.target: Is there a table available near the window?

en.source: I ordered tea, but this looks like coffee.
en.target: I ordered tea, but this looks like coffee.

en.source: I will be home a little later than planned.
en.target: I will be home a little later than planned.

en.source: Please remind me to charge my phone tonight.
en.target: Please remind me to charge my phone tonight.

en.source: The meeting moved to tomorrow morning.
en.target: The meeting moved to tomorrow morning.

en.source: Do you have this in a smaller size?
en.target: Do you have this in a smaller size?

en.source: Can I return this if it does not fit?
en.target: Can I return this if it does not fit?

en.source: I can send the updated file before noon.
en.target: I can send the updated file before noon.

en.source: Let us confirm the deadline before we start.
en.target: Let us confirm the deadline before we start.

en.source: Could you explain that example one more time?
en.target: Could you explain that example one more time?

en.source: I finished the reading but not the worksheet.
en.target: I finished the reading but not the worksheet.

en.source: I have had a headache since this morning.
en.target: I have had a headache since this morning.

en.source: Is there a clinic open on Sunday?
en.target: Is there a clinic open on Sunday?

en.source: That sounds exciting, but also a little stressful.
en.target: That sounds exciting, but also a little stressful.

en.source: How was your first week in the new apartment?
en.target: How was your first week in the new apartment?

en.source: I should have listened before giving advice.
en.target: I should have listened before giving advice.

en.source: Thank you for being patient with me today.
en.target: Thank you for being patient with me today.

en.source: I am comfortable learning new tools quickly.
en.target: I am comfortable learning new tools quickly.

en.source: My strongest skill is staying organized under pressure.

es.source: El aprendizaje mejora con sesiones pequeñas cada día.
es.target: Learning improves with small daily sessions.

es.source: Hablar con claridad ayuda al oyente a entender cada frase.
es.target: Clear speech helps the listener understand each sentence.

es.source: Una rutina constante hace que la práctica sea más fácil de repetir.
es.target: A steady routine makes practice easier to repeat.

es.source: Necesito comprar un boleto para el próximo tren.
es.target: I need to buy a ticket for the next train.

es.source: ¿Puede indicarme dónde está la puerta de embarque?
es.target: Can you show me where the boarding gate is.

es.source: Tengo experiencia trabajando con equipos pequeños.
es.target: I have experience working with small teams.

es.source: Me gustaría explicar por qué soy una buena opción.
es.target: I would like to explain why I am a good fit.

es.source: Tengo una pregunta sobre la tarea de hoy.
es.target: I have a question about today's assignment.

es.source: Voy a preparar la cena después de terminar mi práctica.
es.target: I will make dinner after I finish my practice.

es.source: Quiero un café sin azúcar, por favor.
es.target: I would like a coffee without sugar, please.

es.source: Puedo llamar después de las siete si todavía quieres hablar.
es.target: I can call after seven if you still want to talk.

es.source: Siento haber respondido tan tarde.
es.target: I am sorry I answered so late.

es.source: Necesito un minuto para pensar antes de responder con claridad.
es.target: I need a minute to think before I answer clearly.

es.source: ¿Puede ayudarme a encontrar la entrada?
es.target: Can you help me find the entrance.

es.source: ¿De qué andén sale el próximo tren?
es.target: Which platform does the next train leave from?

es.source: Necesito indicaciones para llegar a la farmacia más cercana.
es.target: I need directions to the nearest pharmacy.

es.source: ¿Puedo dejar mi bolso aquí por unos minutos?
es.target: Can I leave my bag here for a few minutes?

es.source: La reserva está a mi nombre.
es.target: The reservation is under my name.

es.source: ¿Podría traerme la cuenta cuando tenga un momento?
es.target: Could I have the bill when you have a moment?

es.source: ¿Hay una mesa disponible cerca de la ventana?
es.target: Is there a table available near the window?

es.source: Pedí té, pero esto parece café.
es.target: I ordered tea, but this looks like coffee.

es.source: Llegaré a casa un poco más tarde de lo planeado.
es.target: I will be home a little later than planned.

es.source: Por favor, recuérdame cargar mi teléfono esta noche.
es.target: Please remind me to charge my phone tonight.

es.source: La reunión se cambió para mañana por la mañana.
es.target: The meeting moved to tomorrow morning.

es.source: ¿Tiene esto en una talla más pequeña?
es.target: Do you have this in a smaller size?

es.source: ¿Puedo devolver esto si no me queda bien?
es.target: Can I return this if it does not fit?

es.source: Puedo enviar el archivo actualizado antes del mediodía.
es.target: I can send the updated file before noon.

es.source: Confirmemos la fecha límite antes de empezar.
es.target: Let us confirm the deadline before we start.

es.source: ¿Podría explicar ese ejemplo una vez más?
es.target: Could you explain that example one more time?

es.source: Terminé la lectura, pero no la hoja de ejercicios.
es.target: I finished the reading but not the worksheet.

es.source: Me duele la cabeza desde esta mañana.
es.target: I have had a headache since this morning.

es.source: ¿Hay una clínica abierta el domingo?
es.target: Is there a clinic open on Sunday?

es.source: Eso suena emocionante, pero también un poco estresante.
es.target: That sounds exciting, but also a little stressful.

es.source: ¿Cómo fue tu primera semana en el nuevo apartamento?
es.target: How was your first week in the new apartment?

es.source: Debería haber escuchado antes de dar consejos.
es.target: I should have listened before giving advice.

es.source: Gracias por tener paciencia conmigo hoy.
es.target: Thank you for being patient with me today.

es.source: Me siento cómodo aprendiendo herramientas nuevas rápidamente.
es.target: I am comfortable learning new tools quickly.

es.source: Mi habilidad más fuerte es mantenerme organizado bajo presión.
es.target: My strongest skill is staying organized under pressure.

fr.source: L'apprentissage progresse avec de courtes séances quotidiennes.
fr.target: Learning improves with small daily sessions.

fr.source: Une parole claire aide l'auditeur à comprendre chaque phrase.
fr.target: Clear speech helps the listener understand each sentence.

fr.source: Une routine stable rend la pratique plus facile à répéter.
fr.target: A steady routine makes practice easier to repeat.

fr.source: Je voudrais un café sans sucre, s'il vous plaît.
fr.target: I would like a coffee without sugar, please.

fr.source: Je peux appeler après sept heures si tu veux encore parler.
fr.target: I can call after seven if you still want to talk.

fr.source: Je suis désolé d'avoir répondu si tard.
fr.target: I am sorry I answered so late.

fr.source: J'ai besoin d'une minute pour réfléchir avant de répondre clairement.
fr.target: I need a minute to think before I answer clearly.

fr.source: Pouvez-vous m'aider à trouver l'entrée?
fr.target: Can you help me find the entrance.

fr.source: De quel quai part le prochain train ?
fr.target: Which platform does the next train leave from?

fr.source: J'ai besoin d'indications pour aller à la pharmacie la plus proche.
fr.target: I need directions to the nearest pharmacy.

fr.source: Puis-je laisser mon sac ici pendant quelques minutes ?
fr.target: Can I leave my bag here for a few minutes?

fr.source: La réservation est à mon nom.
fr.target: The reservation is under my name.

fr.source: Pourriez-vous m'apporter l'addition quand vous aurez un moment ?
fr.target: Could I have the bill when you have a moment?

fr.source: Y a-t-il une table disponible près de la fenêtre ?
fr.target: Is there a table available near the window?

fr.source: J'ai commandé du thé, mais cela ressemble à du café.
fr.target: I ordered tea, but this looks like coffee.

fr.source: Je rentrerai à la maison un peu plus tard que prévu.
fr.target: I will be home a little later than planned.

fr.source: Rappelle-moi de charger mon téléphone ce soir, s'il te plaît.
fr.target: Please remind me to charge my phone tonight.

fr.source: La réunion a été déplacée à demain matin.
fr.target: The meeting moved to tomorrow morning.

fr.source: Avez-vous ceci dans une taille plus petite ?
fr.target: Do you have this in a smaller size?

fr.source: Puis-je le retourner si cela ne me va pas ?
fr.target: Can I return this if it does not fit?

fr.source: Je peux envoyer le fichier mis à jour avant midi.
fr.target: I can send the updated file before noon.

fr.source: Confirmons la date limite avant de commencer.
fr.target: Let us confirm the deadline before we start.

fr.source: Pourriez-vous expliquer cet exemple encore une fois ?
fr.target: Could you explain that example one more time?

fr.source: J'ai terminé la lecture, mais pas la fiche d'exercices.
fr.target: I finished the reading but not the worksheet.

fr.source: J'ai mal à la tête depuis ce matin.
fr.target: I have had a headache since this morning.

fr.source: Y a-t-il une clinique ouverte le dimanche ?
fr.target: Is there a clinic open on Sunday?

fr.source: Cela semble excitant, mais aussi un peu stressant.
fr.target: That sounds exciting, but also a little stressful.

fr.source: Comment s'est passée ta première semaine dans le nouvel appartement ?
fr.target: How was your first week in the new apartment?

fr.source: J'aurais dû écouter avant de donner des conseils.
fr.target: I should have listened before giving advice.

fr.source: Merci d'avoir été patient avec moi aujourd'hui.
fr.target: Thank you for being patient with me today.

fr.source: Je suis à l'aise pour apprendre rapidement de nouveaux outils.
fr.target: I am comfortable learning new tools quickly.

fr.source: Ma plus grande force est de rester organisé sous pression.
fr.target: My strongest skill is staying organized under pressure.

de.source: Lernen wird durch kleine tägliche Übungen besser.
de.target: Learning improves with small daily sessions.

de.source: Klare Sprache hilft dem Zuhörer, jeden Satz zu verstehen.
de.target: Clear speech helps the listener understand each sentence.

de.source: Eine feste Routine macht das Üben leichter zu wiederholen.
de.target: A steady routine makes practice easier to repeat.

de.source: Ich möchte bitte einen Kaffee ohne Zucker.
de.target: I would like a coffee without sugar, please.

de.source: Ich kann nach sieben Uhr anrufen, wenn du noch reden willst.
de.target: I can call after seven if you still want to talk.

de.source: Es tut mir leid, dass ich so spät geantwortet habe.
de.target: I am sorry I answered so late.

de.source: Ich brauche eine Minute, um klar zu antworten.
de.target: I need a minute to think before I answer clearly.

de.source: Können Sie mir helfen, den Eingang zu finden?
de.target: Can you help me find the entrance.

de.source: Von welchem Bahnsteig fährt der nächste Zug ab?
de.target: Which platform does the next train leave from?

de.source: Ich brauche eine Wegbeschreibung zur nächsten Apotheke.
de.target: I need directions to the nearest pharmacy.

de.source: Kann ich meine Tasche hier ein paar Minuten lassen?
de.target: Can I leave my bag here for a few minutes?

de.source: Die Reservierung läuft auf meinen Namen.
de.target: The reservation is under my name.

de.source: Könnte ich bitte die Rechnung bekommen, wenn Sie einen Moment haben?
de.target: Could I have the bill when you have a moment?

de.source: Ist ein Tisch am Fenster frei?
de.target: Is there a table available near the window?

de.source: Ich habe Tee bestellt, aber das sieht nach Kaffee aus.
de.target: I ordered tea, but this looks like coffee.

de.source: Ich komme etwas später nach Hause als geplant.
de.target: I will be home a little later than planned.

de.source: Bitte erinnere mich daran, mein Handy heute Abend aufzuladen.
de.target: Please remind me to charge my phone tonight.

de.source: Das Meeting wurde auf morgen früh verschoben.
de.target: The meeting moved to tomorrow morning.

de.source: Haben Sie das in einer kleineren Größe?
de.target: Do you have this in a smaller size?

de.source: Kann ich das zurückgeben, wenn es nicht passt?
de.target: Can I return this if it does not fit?

de.source: Ich kann die aktualisierte Datei vor Mittag schicken.
de.target: I can send the updated file before noon.

de.source: Lass uns die Frist bestätigen, bevor wir anfangen.
de.target: Let us confirm the deadline before we start.

de.source: Könnten Sie dieses Beispiel noch einmal erklären?
de.target: Could you explain that example one more time?

de.source: Ich habe die Lektüre beendet, aber nicht das Arbeitsblatt.
de.target: I finished the reading but not the worksheet.

de.source: Ich habe seit heute Morgen Kopfschmerzen.
de.target: I have had a headache since this morning.

de.source: Gibt es sonntags eine geöffnete Klinik?
de.target: Is there a clinic open on Sunday?

de.source: Das klingt aufregend, aber auch ein bisschen stressig.
de.target: That sounds exciting, but also a little stressful.

de.source: Wie war deine erste Woche in der neuen Wohnung?
de.target: How was your first week in the new apartment?

de.source: Ich hätte zuhören sollen, bevor ich Ratschläge gebe.
de.target: I should have listened before giving advice.

de.source: Danke, dass du heute geduldig mit mir warst.
de.target: Thank you for being patient with me today.

de.source: Ich lerne gerne schnell neue Werkzeuge.
de.target: I am comfortable learning new tools quickly.

de.source: Meine stärkste Fähigkeit ist, unter Druck organisiert zu bleiben.
de.target: My strongest skill is staying organized under pressure.

it.source: L'apprendimento migliora con piccole sessioni quotidiane.
it.target: Learning improves with small daily sessions.

it.source: Un parlare chiaro aiuta l'ascoltatore a capire ogni frase.
it.target: Clear speech helps the listener understand each sentence.

it.source: Una routine costante rende la pratica più facile da ripetere.
it.target: A steady routine makes practice easier to repeat.

it.source: Vorrei un caffè senza zucchero, per favore.
it.target: I would like a coffee without sugar, please.

it.source: Posso chiamare dopo le sette se vuoi ancora parlare.
it.target: I can call after seven if you still want to talk.

it.source: Mi dispiace di aver risposto così tardi.
it.target: I am sorry I answered so late.

it.source: Ho bisogno di un minuto per pensare prima di rispondere chiaramente.
it.target: I need a minute to think before I answer clearly.

it.source: Può aiutarmi a trovare l'ingresso?
it.target: Can you help me find the entrance.

it.source: Da quale binario parte il prossimo treno?
it.target: Which platform does the next train leave from?

it.source: Ho bisogno di indicazioni per la farmacia più vicina.
it.target: I need directions to the nearest pharmacy.

it.source: Posso lasciare qui la mia borsa per qualche minuto?
it.target: Can I leave my bag here for a few minutes?

it.source: La prenotazione è a mio nome.
it.target: The reservation is under my name.

it.source: Potrei avere il conto quando ha un momento?
it.target: Could I have the bill when you have a moment?

it.source: C'è un tavolo disponibile vicino alla finestra?
it.target: Is there a table available near the window?

it.source: Ho ordinato tè, ma questo sembra caffè.
it.target: I ordered tea, but this looks like coffee.

it.source: Tornerò a casa un po' più tardi del previsto.
it.target: I will be home a little later than planned.

it.source: Per favore, ricordami di caricare il telefono stasera.
it.target: Please remind me to charge my phone tonight.

it.source: La riunione è stata spostata a domani mattina.
it.target: The meeting moved to tomorrow morning.

it.source: Lo avete in una taglia più piccola?
it.target: Do you have this in a smaller size?

it.source: Posso restituirlo se non mi sta bene?
it.target: Can I return this if it does not fit?

it.source: Posso inviare il file aggiornato prima di mezzogiorno.
it.target: I can send the updated file before noon.

it.source: Confermiamo la scadenza prima di iniziare.
it.target: Let us confirm the deadline before we start.

it.source: Potrebbe spiegare quell'esempio ancora una volta?
it.target: Could you explain that example one more time?

it.source: Ho finito la lettura, ma non il foglio di esercizi.
it.target: I finished the reading but not the worksheet.

it.source: Ho mal di testa da stamattina.
it.target: I have had a headache since this morning.

it.source: C'è una clinica aperta la domenica?
it.target: Is there a clinic open on Sunday?

it.source: Sembra emozionante, ma anche un po' stressante.
it.target: That sounds exciting, but also a little stressful.

it.source: Com'è stata la tua prima settimana nel nuovo appartamento?
it.target: How was your first week in the new apartment?

it.source: Avrei dovuto ascoltare prima di dare consigli.
it.target: I should have listened before giving advice.

it.source: Grazie per essere stato paziente con me oggi.
it.target: Thank you for being patient with me today.

it.source: Mi trovo a mio agio nell'imparare rapidamente nuovi strumenti.
it.target: I am comfortable learning new tools quickly.

it.source: La mia abilità più forte è restare organizzato sotto pressione.
it.target: My strongest skill is staying organized under pressure.

ja.source: 毎日の小さな練習で学習はよくなります。
ja.romanization: Mainichi no chiisana renshu de gakushu wa yoku narimasu.
ja.target: Learning improves with small daily sessions.

ja.source: はっきり話すと聞き手は文を理解しやすくなります。
ja.romanization: Hakkiri hanasu to kikite wa bun o rikai shiyasuku narimasu.
ja.target: Clear speech helps the listener understand each sentence.

ja.source: 安定した習慣は練習を繰り返しやすくします。
ja.romanization: Anteishita shukan wa renshu o kurikaeshi yasuku shimasu.
ja.target: A steady routine makes practice easier to repeat.

ja.source: 砂糖なしのコーヒーをお願いします。
ja.romanization: Satou nashi no koohii o onegaishimasu.
ja.target: I would like a coffee without sugar, please.

ja.source: まだ話したいなら、七時の後に電話できます。
ja.romanization: Mada hanashitai nara shichiji no ato ni denwa dekimasu.
ja.target: I can call after seven if you still want to talk.

ja.source: 返信が遅くなってすみません。
ja.romanization: Henshin ga osokunatte sumimasen.
ja.target: I am sorry I answered so late.

ja.source: はっきり答える前に、考える時間が一分必要です。
ja.romanization: Hakkiri kotaeru mae ni kangaeru jikan ga ichibun hitsuyou desu.
ja.target: I need a minute to think before I answer clearly.

ja.source: 入口を見つけるのを手伝ってくれますか。
ja.romanization: Iriguchi o mitsukeru no o tetsudatte kuremasu ka.
ja.target: Can you help me find the entrance.

ja.source: 次の電車は何番ホームから出ますか。
ja.target: Which platform does the next train leave from?
ja.romanization: Tsugi no densha wa nanban hoomu kara demasu ka.

ja.source: 一番近い薬局への道を教えてください。
ja.target: I need directions to the nearest pharmacy.
ja.romanization: Ichiban chikai yakkyoku e no michi o oshiete kudasai.

ja.source: このバッグを数分ここに置いてもいいですか。
ja.target: Can I leave my bag here for a few minutes?
ja.romanization: Kono baggu o suufun koko ni oitemo ii desu ka.

ja.source: 予約は私の名前です。
ja.target: The reservation is under my name.
ja.romanization: Yoyaku wa watashi no namae desu.

ja.source: お時間があるときにお会計をお願いします。
ja.target: Could I have the bill when you have a moment?
ja.romanization: Ojikan ga aru toki ni okaikei o onegaishimasu.

ja.source: 窓の近くに空いている席はありますか。
ja.target: Is there a table available near the window?
ja.romanization: Mado no chikaku ni aite iru seki wa arimasu ka.

ja.source: 紅茶を注文しましたが、これはコーヒーのようです。
ja.target: I ordered tea, but this looks like coffee.
ja.romanization: Koucha o chumon shimashita ga, kore wa koohii no you desu.

ja.source: 予定より少し遅く帰ります。
ja.target: I will be home a little later than planned.
ja.romanization: Yotei yori sukoshi osoku kaerimasu.

ja.source: 今夜、携帯を充電するように思い出させてください。
ja.target: Please remind me to charge my phone tonight.
ja.romanization: Konya, keitai o juuden suru you ni omoidasasete kudasai.

ja.source: 会議は明日の朝に変更されました。
ja.target: The meeting moved to tomorrow morning.
ja.romanization: Kaigi wa ashita no asa ni henkou saremashita.

ja.source: これの小さいサイズはありますか。
ja.target: Do you have this in a smaller size?
ja.romanization: Kore no chiisai saizu wa arimasu ka.

ja.source: 合わなければ返品できますか。
ja.target: Can I return this if it does not fit?
ja.romanization: Awanakereba henpin dekimasu ka.

ja.source: 正午までに更新したファイルを送れます。
ja.target: I can send the updated file before noon.
ja.romanization: Shougo made ni koushin shita fairu o okuremasu.

ja.source: 始める前に締め切りを確認しましょう。
ja.target: Let us confirm the deadline before we start.
ja.romanization: Hajimeru mae ni shimekiri o kakunin shimashou.

ja.source: その例をもう一度説明していただけますか。
ja.target: Could you explain that example one more time?
ja.romanization: Sono rei o mou ichido setsumei shite itadakemasu ka.

ja.source: 読み物は終わりましたが、ワークシートはまだです。
ja.target: I finished the reading but not the worksheet.
ja.romanization: Yomimono wa owarimashita ga, waakushiito wa mada desu.

ja.source: 今朝から頭が痛いです。
ja.target: I have had a headache since this morning.
ja.romanization: Kesa kara atama ga itai desu.

ja.source: 日曜日に開いているクリニックはありますか。
ja.target: Is there a clinic open on Sunday?
ja.romanization: Nichiyoubi ni aite iru kurinikku wa arimasu ka.

ja.source: それは楽しそうですが、少しストレスもありそうです。
ja.target: That sounds exciting, but also a little stressful.
ja.romanization: Sore wa tanoshisou desu ga, sukoshi sutoresu mo arisou desu.

ja.source: 新しいアパートでの最初の週はどうでしたか。
ja.target: How was your first week in the new apartment?
ja.romanization: Atarashii apaato de no saisho no shuu wa dou deshita ka.

ja.source: 助言する前に聞くべきでした。
ja.target: I should have listened before giving advice.
ja.romanization: Jogen suru mae ni kiku beki deshita.

ja.source: 今日、辛抱強くいてくれてありがとうございます。
ja.target: Thank you for being patient with me today.
ja.romanization: Kyou, shinbouzuyoku ite kurete arigatou gozaimasu.

ja.source: 新しい道具をすばやく学ぶことには慣れています。
ja.target: I am comfortable learning new tools quickly.
ja.romanization: Atarashii dougu o subayaku manabu koto ni wa narete imasu.

ja.source: 私の一番の強みは、プレッシャーの中でも整理して動けることです。
ja.target: My strongest skill is staying organized under pressure.
ja.romanization: Watashi no ichiban no tsuyomi wa, puresshaa no naka demo seiri shite ugokeru koto desu.

zh.source: 每天短时间练习能帮助学习进步。
zh.romanization: Meitian duan shijian lianxi neng bangzhu xuexi jinbu.
zh.target: Learning improves with small daily sessions.

zh.source: 清楚地说话帮助听者理解每个句子。
zh.romanization: Qingchu de shuohua bangzhu tingzhe lijie mei ge juzi.
zh.target: Clear speech helps the listener understand each sentence.

zh.source: 稳定的习惯让练习更容易重复。
zh.romanization: Wending de xiguan rang lianxi geng rongyi chongfu.
zh.target: A steady routine makes practice easier to repeat.

zh.source: 请给我一杯不加糖的咖啡。
zh.romanization: Qing gei wo yi bei bu jia tang de kafei.
zh.target: I would like a coffee without sugar, please.

zh.source: 如果你还想聊，我可以七点后打电话。
zh.romanization: Ruguo ni hai xiang liao, wo keyi qi dian hou da dianhua.
zh.target: I can call after seven if you still want to talk.

zh.source: 很抱歉我回复晚了。
zh.romanization: Hen bao qian wo hui fu wan le.
zh.target: I am sorry I answered so late.

zh.source: 我需要一分钟想清楚再回答。
zh.romanization: Wo xuyao yi fenzhong xiang qingchu zai huida.
zh.target: I need a minute to think before I answer clearly.

zh.source: 你能帮我找到入口吗？
zh.romanization: Ni neng bang wo zhao dao rukou ma.
zh.target: Can you help me find the entrance.

zh.source: 下一班火车从哪个站台出发？
zh.target: Which platform does the next train leave from?
zh.romanization: Xia yi ban huoche cong nage zhantai chufa?

zh.source: 我需要去最近药店的路线。
zh.target: I need directions to the nearest pharmacy.
zh.romanization: Wo xuyao qu zuijin yaodian de luxian.

zh.source: 我可以把包放在这里几分钟吗？
zh.target: Can I leave my bag here for a few minutes?
zh.romanization: Wo keyi ba bao fang zai zheli ji fenzhong ma?

zh.source: 预订是在我的名字下。
zh.target: The reservation is under my name.
zh.romanization: Yuding shi zai wo de mingzi xia.

zh.source: 你有空的时候可以给我账单吗？
zh.target: Could I have the bill when you have a moment?
zh.romanization: Ni you kong de shihou keyi gei wo zhangdan ma?

zh.source: 靠窗有空桌吗？
zh.target: Is there a table available near the window?
zh.romanization: Kao chuang you kong zhuo ma?

zh.source: 我点的是茶，但这个看起来像咖啡。
zh.target: I ordered tea, but this looks like coffee.
zh.romanization: Wo dian de shi cha, dan zhege kan qilai xiang kafei.

zh.source: 我会比计划晚一点回家。
zh.target: I will be home a little later than planned.
zh.romanization: Wo hui bi jihua wan yidian hui jia.

zh.source: 请提醒我今晚给手机充电。
zh.target: Please remind me to charge my phone tonight.
zh.romanization: Qing tixing wo jinwan gei shouji chongdian.

zh.source: 会议改到明天早上了。
zh.target: The meeting moved to tomorrow morning.
zh.romanization: Huiyi gai dao mingtian zaoshang le.

zh.source: 这个有小一点的尺码吗？
zh.target: Do you have this in a smaller size?
zh.romanization: Zhege you xiao yidian de chima ma?

zh.source: 如果不合适，我可以退货吗？
zh.target: Can I return this if it does not fit?
zh.romanization: Ruguo bu heshi, wo keyi tuihuo ma?

zh.source: 我可以在中午前发送更新后的文件。
zh.target: I can send the updated file before noon.
zh.romanization: Wo keyi zai zhongwu qian fasong gengxin hou de wenjian.

zh.source: 开始之前，我们先确认截止日期。
zh.target: Let us confirm the deadline before we start.
zh.romanization: Kaishi zhiqian, women xian queren jiezhi riqi.

zh.source: 你可以再解释一次那个例子吗？
zh.target: Could you explain that example one more time?
zh.romanization: Ni keyi zai jieshi yici nage lizi ma?

zh.source: 我读完了材料，但还没完成练习表。
zh.target: I finished the reading but not the worksheet.
zh.romanization: Wo du wan le cailiao, dan hai mei wancheng lianxi biao.

zh.source: 我从今天早上开始头痛。
zh.target: I have had a headache since this morning.
zh.romanization: Wo cong jintian zaoshang kaishi toutong.

zh.source: 星期天有开的诊所吗？
zh.target: Is there a clinic open on Sunday?
zh.romanization: Xingqitian you kai de zhensuo ma?

zh.source: 那听起来很令人兴奋，但也有点压力。
zh.target: That sounds exciting, but also a little stressful.
zh.romanization: Na ting qilai hen lingren xingfen, dan ye youdian yali.

zh.source: 你在新公寓的第一周怎么样？
zh.target: How was your first week in the new apartment?
zh.romanization: Ni zai xin gongyu de di yi zhou zenmeyang?

zh.source: 我应该先听你说，再给建议。
zh.target: I should have listened before giving advice.
zh.romanization: Wo yinggai xian ting ni shuo, zai gei jianyi.

zh.source: 谢谢你今天对我有耐心。
zh.target: Thank you for being patient with me today.
zh.romanization: Xiexie ni jintian dui wo you naixin.

zh.source: 我能够很快学习新的工具。
zh.target: I am comfortable learning new tools quickly.
zh.romanization: Wo nenggou hen kuai xuexi xin de gongju.

zh.source: 我最强的能力是在压力下保持有条理。
zh.target: My strongest skill is staying organized under pressure.
zh.romanization: Wo zui qiang de nengli shi zai yali xia baochi you tiaoli.

ru.source: Обучение становится лучше благодаря небольшим ежедневным занятиям.
ru.romanization: Obuchenie stanovitsya luchshe blagodarya nebolshim ezhednevnym zanyatiyam.
ru.target: Learning improves with small daily sessions.

ru.source: Четкая речь помогает слушателю понять каждое предложение.
ru.romanization: Chetkaya rech pomogaet slushatelyu ponyat kazhdoe predlozhenie.
ru.target: Clear speech helps the listener understand each sentence.

ru.source: Устойчивая рутина делает практику проще для повторения.
ru.romanization: Ustoychivaya rutina delaet praktiku prosche dlya povtoreniya.
ru.target: A steady routine makes practice easier to repeat.

ru.source: Мне, пожалуйста, кофе без сахара.
ru.romanization: Mne pozhaluysta kofe bez sakhara.
ru.target: I would like a coffee without sugar, please.

ru.source: Я могу позвонить после семи, если ты все еще хочешь поговорить.
ru.romanization: Ya mogu pozvonit posle semi, esli ty vse eshche khochesh pogovorit.
ru.target: I can call after seven if you still want to talk.

ru.source: Простите, что я так поздно ответил.
ru.romanization: Prostite chto ya tak pozdno otvetil.
ru.target: I am sorry I answered so late.

ru.source: Мне нужна минута, чтобы подумать и ясно ответить.
ru.romanization: Mne nuzhna minuta chtoby podumat i jasno otvetit.
ru.target: I need a minute to think before I answer clearly.

ru.source: Вы можете помочь мне найти вход?
ru.romanization: Vy mozhete pomoch mne nayti vhod.
ru.target: Can you help me find the entrance.

ru.source: С какой платформы отправляется следующий поезд?
ru.target: Which platform does the next train leave from?
ru.romanization: S kakoy platformy otpravlyaetsya sleduyushchiy poyezd?

ru.source: Мне нужны указания до ближайшей аптеки.
ru.target: I need directions to the nearest pharmacy.
ru.romanization: Mne nuzhny ukazaniya do blizhayshey apteki.

ru.source: Можно оставить мою сумку здесь на несколько минут?
ru.target: Can I leave my bag here for a few minutes?
ru.romanization: Mozhno ostavit moyu sumku zdes na neskolko minut?

ru.source: Бронирование оформлено на мое имя.
ru.target: The reservation is under my name.
ru.romanization: Bronirovanie oformleno na moe imya.

ru.source: Можно принести счет, когда у вас будет минутка?
ru.target: Could I have the bill when you have a moment?
ru.romanization: Mozhno prinesti schet, kogda u vas budet minutka?

ru.source: Есть свободный столик у окна?
ru.target: Is there a table available near the window?
ru.romanization: Est svobodnyy stolik u okna?

ru.source: Я заказал чай, но это похоже на кофе.
ru.target: I ordered tea, but this looks like coffee.
ru.romanization: Ya zakazal chay, no eto pokhozhe na kofe.

ru.source: Я буду дома немного позже, чем планировалось.
ru.target: I will be home a little later than planned.
ru.romanization: Ya budu doma nemnogo pozzhe, chem planirovalos.

ru.source: Пожалуйста, напомни мне зарядить телефон сегодня вечером.
ru.target: Please remind me to charge my phone tonight.
ru.romanization: Pozhaluysta, napomni mne zaryadit telefon segodnya vecherom.

ru.source: Встречу перенесли на завтра утром.
ru.target: The meeting moved to tomorrow morning.
ru.romanization: Vstrechu perenesli na zavtra utrom.

ru.source: У вас есть это в меньшем размере?
ru.target: Do you have this in a smaller size?
ru.romanization: U vas est eto v menshem razmere?

ru.source: Можно вернуть это, если не подойдет?
ru.target: Can I return this if it does not fit?
ru.romanization: Mozhno vernut eto, esli ne podoydet?

ru.source: Я могу отправить обновленный файл до полудня.
ru.target: I can send the updated file before noon.
ru.romanization: Ya mogu otpravit obnovlennyy fayl do poludnya.

ru.source: Давайте подтвердим срок, прежде чем начнем.
ru.target: Let us confirm the deadline before we start.
ru.romanization: Davayte podtverdim srok, prezhde chem nachnem.

ru.source: Можете объяснить этот пример еще раз?
ru.target: Could you explain that example one more time?
ru.romanization: Mozhete obyasnit etot primer eshche raz?

ru.source: Я закончил чтение, но не рабочий лист.
ru.target: I finished the reading but not the worksheet.
ru.romanization: Ya zakonchil chtenie, no ne rabochiy list.

ru.source: У меня болит голова с сегодняшнего утра.
ru.target: I have had a headache since this morning.
ru.romanization: U menya bolit golova s segodnyashnego utra.

ru.source: Есть клиника, открытая в воскресенье?
ru.target: Is there a clinic open on Sunday?
ru.romanization: Est klinika, otkrytaya v voskresene?

ru.source: Это звучит захватывающе, но и немного напряженно.
ru.target: That sounds exciting, but also a little stressful.
ru.romanization: Eto zvuchit zakhvatyvayushche, no i nemnogo napryazhenno.

ru.source: Как прошла твоя первая неделя в новой квартире?
ru.target: How was your first week in the new apartment?
ru.romanization: Kak proshla tvoya pervaya nedelya v novoy kvartire?

ru.source: Мне стоило выслушать, прежде чем давать совет.
ru.target: I should have listened before giving advice.
ru.romanization: Mne stoilo vyslushat, prezhde chem davat sovet.

ru.source: Спасибо, что сегодня был терпелив со мной.
ru.target: Thank you for being patient with me today.
ru.romanization: Spasibo, chto segodnya byl terpeliv so mnoy.

ru.source: Мне комфортно быстро учиться новым инструментам.
ru.target: I am comfortable learning new tools quickly.
ru.romanization: Mne komfortno bystro uchitsya novym instrumentam.

ru.source: Моя сильнейшая сторона - сохранять организованность под давлением.
ru.target: My strongest skill is staying organized under pressure.
ru.romanization: Moya silneyshaya storona - sokhranyat organizovannost pod davleniem.

ar.source: يتحسن التعلم مع جلسات صغيرة يومية.
ar.romanization: Al taallum yatahasan maa jalsat saghira yawmiyya.
ar.target: Learning improves with small daily sessions.

ar.source: الكلام الواضح يساعد المستمع على فهم كل جملة.
ar.romanization: Al kalam al wadih yusaeid al mustami ala fahm kull jumlah.
ar.target: Clear speech helps the listener understand each sentence.

ar.source: الروتين الثابت يجعل الممارسة أسهل للتكرار.
ar.romanization: Al rotina al thabita tajal al mumarasa ashal lil tikrar.
ar.target: A steady routine makes practice easier to repeat.

ar.source: أريد قهوة بلا سكر من فضلك.
ar.romanization: Ureed qahwa bila sukkar min fadlik.
ar.target: I would like a coffee without sugar, please.

ar.source: يمكنني الاتصال بعد السابعة إذا كنت ما زلت تريد الكلام.
ar.romanization: Yumkinuni al ittisal baad al sabia idha kunta turid al kalam.
ar.target: I can call after seven if you still want to talk.

ar.source: أنا آسف لردي المتأخر.
ar.romanization: Ana aasif li raddi al mutaakhir.
ar.target: I am sorry I answered so late.

ar.source: أحتاج إلى دقيقة لأفكر قبل أن أجيب بوضوح.
ar.romanization: Ahtaju ila daqiqa li afakkir qabla an ujeeb bi wuduh.
ar.target: I need a minute to think before I answer clearly.

ar.source: هل يمكنك مساعدتي في إيجاد المدخل؟
ar.romanization: Hal yumkinuk musa adati fi ijad al madkhal.
ar.target: Can you help me find the entrance.

ar.source: من أي رصيف يغادر القطار التالي؟
ar.target: Which platform does the next train leave from?
ar.romanization: Min ayyi raseef yughadir al-qitar al-tali?

ar.source: أحتاج إلى الاتجاهات إلى أقرب صيدلية.
ar.target: I need directions to the nearest pharmacy.
ar.romanization: Ahtaj ila al-ittijahat ila aqrab saydaliyya.

ar.source: هل يمكنني ترك حقيبتي هنا لبضع دقائق؟
ar.target: Can I leave my bag here for a few minutes?
ar.romanization: Hal yumkinuni tark haqibati huna libid daqaiq?

ar.source: الحجز باسمي.
ar.target: The reservation is under my name.
ar.romanization: Al-hajz bi-ismi.

ar.source: هل يمكنني الحصول على الفاتورة عندما يكون لديك وقت؟
ar.target: Could I have the bill when you have a moment?
ar.romanization: Hal yumkinuni al-husul ala al-fatura indama yakun ladayka waqt?

ar.source: هل توجد طاولة متاحة قرب النافذة؟
ar.target: Is there a table available near the window?
ar.romanization: Hal tujad tawila mutaha qurb al-nafidha?

ar.source: طلبت الشاي، لكن هذا يبدو مثل القهوة.
ar.target: I ordered tea, but this looks like coffee.
ar.romanization: Talabtu al-shay, lakin hatha yabdu mithl al-qahwa.

ar.source: سأصل إلى المنزل متأخرا قليلا عن المخطط.
ar.target: I will be home a little later than planned.
ar.romanization: Saasil ila al-manzil mutaakhiran qalilan an al-mukhattat.

ar.source: من فضلك ذكرني بشحن هاتفي الليلة.
ar.target: Please remind me to charge my phone tonight.
ar.romanization: Min fadlik dhakkirni bishahn hatifi al-layla.

ar.source: تم نقل الاجتماع إلى صباح الغد.
ar.target: The meeting moved to tomorrow morning.
ar.romanization: Tam naql al-ijtima ila sabah al-ghad.

ar.source: هل لديكم هذا بمقاس أصغر؟
ar.target: Do you have this in a smaller size?
ar.romanization: Hal ladaykum hatha bimiqas asghar?

ar.source: هل يمكنني إرجاعه إذا لم يناسبني؟
ar.target: Can I return this if it does not fit?
ar.romanization: Hal yumkinuni irjaahu idha lam yunasibni?

ar.source: يمكنني إرسال الملف المحدث قبل الظهر.
ar.target: I can send the updated file before noon.
ar.romanization: Yumkinuni irsal al-malaf al-muhaddath qabl al-zuhr.

ar.source: لنؤكد الموعد النهائي قبل أن نبدأ.
ar.target: Let us confirm the deadline before we start.
ar.romanization: Linuakkid al-mawid al-nihai qabl an nabda.

ar.source: هل يمكنك شرح ذلك المثال مرة أخرى؟
ar.target: Could you explain that example one more time?
ar.romanization: Hal yumkinuka sharh dhalika al-mithal marra ukhra?

ar.source: أنهيت القراءة، لكنني لم أنه ورقة التمارين.
ar.target: I finished the reading but not the worksheet.
ar.romanization: Anhaytu al-qiraa, lakinni lam unhi waraqat al-tamarin.

ar.source: أعاني من صداع منذ هذا الصباح.
ar.target: I have had a headache since this morning.
ar.romanization: Uani min suda mundhu hatha al-sabah.

ar.source: هل توجد عيادة مفتوحة يوم الأحد؟
ar.target: Is there a clinic open on Sunday?
ar.romanization: Hal tujad iyada maftuha yawm al-ahad?

ar.source: يبدو ذلك مثيرا، لكنه مرهق قليلا أيضا.
ar.target: That sounds exciting, but also a little stressful.
ar.romanization: Yabdu dhalika muthiran, lakinnahu murhiq qalilan aydan.

ar.source: كيف كان أسبوعك الأول في الشقة الجديدة؟
ar.target: How was your first week in the new apartment?
ar.romanization: Kayfa kana usbuuka al-awwal fi al-shaqqa al-jadida?

ar.source: كان يجب أن أستمع قبل أن أقدم النصيحة.
ar.target: I should have listened before giving advice.
ar.romanization: Kana yajibu an astami qabl an uqaddim al-nasiha.

ar.source: شكرا لصبرك معي اليوم.
ar.target: Thank you for being patient with me today.
ar.romanization: Shukran lisabrika mai al-yawm.

ar.source: أرتاح لتعلم أدوات جديدة بسرعة.
ar.target: I am comfortable learning new tools quickly.
ar.romanization: Artah litaallum adawat jadida bisura.

ar.source: أقوى مهاراتي هي البقاء منظما تحت الضغط.
ar.target: My strongest skill is staying organized under pressure.
ar.romanization: Aqwa maharati hiya al-baqa munazzaman taht al-daght.

ko.source: 매일 작은 연습으로 배움이 더 좋아집니다.
ko.romanization: Maeil jageun yeonseubeuro baeumi deo joajimnida.
ko.target: Learning improves with small daily sessions.

ko.source: 분명한 말은 듣는 사람이 각 문장을 이해하게 도와줍니다.
ko.romanization: Bunmyeonghan mareun deutneun sarami gak munjangeul ihaehage dowajumnida.
ko.target: Clear speech helps the listener understand each sentence.

ko.source: 안정된 루틴은 연습을 더 쉽게 반복하게 합니다.
ko.romanization: Anjeongdoen routine eun yeonseubeul deo swipge banbokhage hamnida.
ko.target: A steady routine makes practice easier to repeat.

ko.source: 다음 기차 표를 사고 싶습니다.
ko.romanization: Daeum gicha pyoreul sago sipseumnida.
ko.target: I would like to buy a ticket for the next train.

ko.source: 저는 작은 팀과 함께 일해 본 경험이 있습니다.
ko.romanization: Jeoneun jageun tim gwa hamkke ilhae bon gyeongheomi itseumnida.
ko.target: I have experience working with small teams.

ko.source: 오늘 숙제에 대해 질문이 있습니다.
ko.romanization: Oneul sukje e daehae jilmuni itseumnida.
ko.target: I have a question about today's assignment.

ko.source: 연습을 끝내고 저녁을 준비할 거예요.
ko.romanization: Yeonseubeul kkeunnaego jeonyeok eul junbi hal geoyeyo.
ko.target: I will make dinner after I finish my practice.

ko.source: 설탕 없는 커피 한 잔 주세요.
ko.romanization: Seoltang eomneun keopi han jan juseyo.
ko.target: I would like a coffee without sugar, please.

ko.source: 아직 이야기하고 싶으면 일곱 시 이후에 전화할 수 있어요.
ko.romanization: Ajik yaegi hago sipeumyeon ilgop si ihu e jeonhwa hal su itseoyo.
ko.target: I can call after seven if you still want to talk.

ko.source: 늦게 답해서 죄송합니다.
ko.romanization: Neuje dapaeseo joesonghamnida.
ko.target: I am sorry I answered so late.

ko.source: 분명하게 대답하기 전에 생각할 시간이 잠깐 필요해요.
ko.romanization: Bunmyeonghage daedaphagi jeon e saenggakhal sigani jamkkan piryohaeyo.
ko.target: I need a minute to think before I answer clearly.

ko.source: 입구 찾는 것을 도와주실 수 있나요?
ko.romanization: Ipgu chatneun geoseul dowa jusil su innayo.
ko.target: Can you help me find the entrance.

ko.source: 다음 기차는 어느 플랫폼에서 출발하나요?
ko.target: Which platform does the next train leave from?
ko.romanization: Daeum gichaneun eoneu peullaetpomeseo chulbalhanayo?

ko.source: 가장 가까운 약국으로 가는 길을 알려 주세요.
ko.target: I need directions to the nearest pharmacy.
ko.romanization: Gajang gakkaun yakgugeuro ganeun gireul allyeo juseyo.

ko.source: 제 가방을 여기 몇 분 동안 두어도 될까요?
ko.target: Can I leave my bag here for a few minutes?
ko.romanization: Je gabangeul yeogi myeot bun dongan dueodo doelkkayo?

ko.source: 예약은 제 이름으로 되어 있습니다.
ko.target: The reservation is under my name.
ko.romanization: Yeyageun je ireumeuro doeeo itseumnida.

ko.source: 시간 되실 때 계산서를 받을 수 있을까요?
ko.target: Could I have the bill when you have a moment?
ko.romanization: Sigan doesil ttae gyesanseoreul badeul su isseulkkayo?

ko.source: 창가 근처에 빈 테이블이 있나요?
ko.target: Is there a table available near the window?
ko.romanization: Changga geuncheoe bin teibeuri innayo?

ko.source: 저는 차를 주문했는데 이것은 커피처럼 보여요.
ko.target: I ordered tea, but this looks like coffee.
ko.romanization: Jeoneun chareul jumunhaenneunde igeoseun keopicheoreom boyeoyo.

ko.source: 예정보다 조금 늦게 집에 갈게요.
ko.target: I will be home a little later than planned.
ko.romanization: Yejeongboda jogeum neutge jibe galgeyo.

ko.source: 오늘 밤에 휴대폰을 충전하라고 알려 주세요.
ko.target: Please remind me to charge my phone tonight.
ko.romanization: Oneul bame hyudaeponeul chungjeonharago allyeo juseyo.

ko.source: 회의가 내일 아침으로 옮겨졌어요.
ko.target: The meeting moved to tomorrow morning.
ko.romanization: Hoeuiga naeil achimeuro omgyeojyeosseoyo.

ko.source: 이것보다 작은 사이즈가 있나요?
ko.target: Do you have this in a smaller size?
ko.romanization: Igeotboda jageun saijeuga innayo?

ko.source: 맞지 않으면 반품할 수 있나요?
ko.target: Can I return this if it does not fit?
ko.romanization: Matji aneumyeon banpumhal su innayo?

ko.source: 정오 전에 업데이트된 파일을 보낼 수 있습니다.
ko.target: I can send the updated file before noon.
ko.romanization: Jeong-o jeone eopdeiteudoen paireul bonael su itseumnida.

ko.source: 시작하기 전에 마감일을 확인합시다.
ko.target: Let us confirm the deadline before we start.
ko.romanization: Sijakagi jeone magamireul hwaginhapshida.

ko.source: 그 예를 한 번 더 설명해 주실 수 있나요?
ko.target: Could you explain that example one more time?
ko.romanization: Geu yereul han beon deo seolmyeonghae jusil su innayo?

ko.source: 읽기는 끝냈지만 학습지는 아직 못 했어요.
ko.target: I finished the reading but not the worksheet.
ko.romanization: Ilgineun kkeutnaetjiman hakseupjineun ajik mot haesseoyo.

ko.source: 오늘 아침부터 머리가 아파요.
ko.target: I have had a headache since this morning.
ko.romanization: Oneul achimbuteo meoriga apayo.

ko.source: 일요일에 여는 병원이 있나요?
ko.target: Is there a clinic open on Sunday?
ko.romanization: Iryoile yeoneun byeongwoni innayo?

ko.source: 신나게 들리지만 조금 스트레스도 될 것 같아요.
ko.target: That sounds exciting, but also a little stressful.
ko.romanization: Sinnage deullijiman jogeum seuteureseudo doel geot gatayo.

ko.source: 새 아파트에서의 첫 주는 어땠어요?
ko.target: How was your first week in the new apartment?
ko.romanization: Sae apateueseoui cheot juneun eottaesseoyo?

ko.source: 조언하기 전에 먼저 들었어야 했어요.
ko.target: I should have listened before giving advice.
ko.romanization: Joeonhagi jeone meonjeo deureosseoya haesseoyo.

ko.source: 오늘 저에게 인내심을 보여 줘서 고마워요.
ko.target: Thank you for being patient with me today.
ko.romanization: Oneul jeoege innaesimeul boyeo jwoseo gomawoyo.

ko.source: 저는 새로운 도구를 빠르게 배우는 데 익숙합니다.
ko.target: I am comfortable learning new tools quickly.
ko.romanization: Jeoneun saeroun dogureul ppareuge baeuneun de iksukhamnida.

ko.source: 제 가장 강한 능력은 압박 속에서도 정리된 상태를 유지하는 것입니다.
ko.target: My strongest skill is staying organized under pressure.
ko.romanization: Je gajang ganghan neungnyeogeun apbak sogeseodo jeongnidoen sangtaereul yujihaneun geosimnida.
